metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: using-jules
plugins.description: Guide for using Google Jules, the asynchronous AI coding agent

plugins.name: moon
plugins.description: Comprehensive moonrepo/moon knowledge for monorepo management, task running, and CI/CD integration

plugins.name: svelte
plugins.description: Modern Svelte 5 and SvelteKit development assistant with runes patterns, remote functions, testing, performance optimization, proactive code review, and LSP support.

plugins.name: context-files
plugins.description: Tools for optimizing AI context files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md) and reviewing sessions for friction. Includes /review and /session-review commands.
